intro: Alpinia officinarum decoction, also known as ginger tea, has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and digestive properties. The decoction is made by boiling the roots of the Alpinia officinarum plant, which is native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, in water to release its active compounds. Drinking alpinia officinarum decoction may help alleviate nausea, relieve pain, and support overall well-being.
